source.title: Introducing a way to reflect on how you use Claude

userProblem.en: What four human abilities separate effective AI use from frequent AI use?
userProblem.zh: 真正会用 AI 的人，强在哪四个能力？

centralThesis.en: AI fluency is a four-part human responsibility loop: choose the AI role, make intent observable, evaluate evidence, and govern real-world use.
centralThesis.zh: AI 熟练度是一条由人负责的四步循环：选择 AI 角色、让意图可理解、判断证据、控制并验证真实使用。

P0: Delegation: set goals and decide whether and how to engage AI
Description: describe goals so useful AI behavior and outputs are possible
Discernment: assess the usefulness of AI outputs and behavior
Diligence: take responsibility for how AI is used and what follows
P1: Turn the four dimensions into a repeatable task loop
Define practical questions and failure modes for each dimension
Use a zero-to-two task scorecard and treat any zero as a stop signal
P2: Use bounded examples for email drafting, launch planning, research review, interrupted tasks, and publishing verification
Preserve the source boundary: product reflection features illustrate behavior but are not the video's selling point
P3: Detailed product navigation, account eligibility, quiet-hour settings, and privacy exclusions are compressed because they do not change the 4D working method

factBoundaries: The four dimension names and definitions come directly from the source page.
The operational questions, permission ladder, examples, and 0-2 scorecard are explanatory tools created for this video.
No example is presented as an Anthropic case study or measured result.

reusableArtifact.name: 4D AI Fluency Card / 4D AI 能力自查卡
reusableArtifact.scoring: Score each task from 0 to 2 on Delegation, Description, Discernment, and Diligence; repair any zero before expanding authority.

chapters.purpose: Replace usage volume with observable decisions
Choose whether, where, and how AI participates
Turn intent into a high-signal brief
Test task fit, evidence, and uncertainty
Control authority and verify real outcomes
Use the dimensions as one repair loop
Apply the reusable zero-to-two task card
Restate the chain and hand off the fixed CTA

sharedVisualSemantics.humanRole: sets goals, makes judgment calls, grants authority, reviews evidence, and owns the outcome
sharedVisualSemantics.agentRole: receives bounded work, executes tools, exposes uncertainty, preserves state, and returns evidence
compositionIntent: process loop for the four dimensions

localeRule: English and Chinese share thesis, priority, chapter order, fact boundaries, character tasks, and reusable artifact; narration, VTT, timing map, and animation timings are compiled independently.
